title: Maxicrop POPGSYDL Original Seaweed Extract, Organic Plant Growth Stimulant, 500ML, Concentrate, Brown
features: GROWTH STIMULANT: A powerful natural plant growth stimulant with added seaweed extract that brings out the best in your plants
BOOSTING AND NUTRITIONAL: Boosts healthy root development and ensures maximum nutrient uptake
SUITABLE FOR: Ideal for use on all plants, including flowers, shrubs, trees, fruit and vegetables, in the home, garden, or allotment
IMPROVING AND STRENGTHENING: Improves natural plant health and the ability to withstand transplant shock, and environmental stresses, including drought
ORGANIC: Approved and certified for organic growing by the Soil Association
description: From the manufacturer BOOSTS PLANT HEALTH AND RESILIENCE Maxicrop promotes robust root development, improves nutrient absorption, and enhances plants’ ability to withstand environmental stress, such as drought or challenging conditions. VERSATILE AND EFFECTIVE FOR ALL PLANTS Whether for flowers, shrubs, fruits, vegetables, or lawns, Maxicrop improves growth at every stage—from stronger seedlings to healthier transplants—helping you achieve a lush and vibrant garden. SUPPORTS ORGANIC AND SUSTAINABLE GARDENING Soil Association Certified and free from synthetic additives, Maxicrop allows you to nurture your garden naturally, ensuring your plants thrive in a natural way. product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: Keep out of reach of children. Avoid contact with skin and eyes. If contact occurs, rinse immediately with plenty of water. Do not ingest. Store in a cool, dry place away from heat and open flames. Do not use near food or feed areas.
